document.title: AKTI ERP Phase 2 Autonomous Codex Execution Pack
document.purpose: Machine-readable active scope contract for the Phase 2 full autonomous execution branch run.
document.p2_ctrl_001_note: Adopts reviewed Phase 2 v3 autonomous queue and decision rules after P2A-001.

run_contract.start_point: current merged main containing Phase 1 final implementation plus Phase 2 control documents and approved control-document corrections
run_contract.scope_authority: This execution pack is the active run contract after Codex validates it against repo reality.
run_contract.failure_model: Failure is allowed. Codex must stop honestly and preserve audit artifacts.
run_contract.final_phase_1_implementation_commit: 18f497d P1H-FINAL harden access reads and capability duplicates
run_contract.branch_creation_rule: Create phase2/autonomous-full-run only from clean current main after control-document corrections are merged.

global_non_scope: No production auth/session unless separate ADR/ticket approves it
No LMS, HR, Finance, Hiring, Certification, Website Builder, or AI Content Editor
No direct Meta/WhatsApp API calls from Lead Desk
No frontend screen without screen contract
No secrets, production data, or destructive operations
No broad schema redesign outside planned tickets
Mutation of active Phase 2 control documents during autonomous implementation tickets

global_rules.ticket_transition_rule: Move to next ticket only after validation, self-audit, artifacts, journal update, and commit for current ticket.
global_rules.unexpected_change_rule: Stop if a required change touches files outside files_expected_to_change or files_forbidden_to_change.
global_rules.scope_invention_rule: Stop if a capability, role, permission, event, module, screen, business rule, or data model must be invented.
global_rules.frontend_rule: No frontend screen implementation without approved screen contract.
global_rules.lead_whatsapp_rule: Lead Desk must not call Meta/WhatsApp directly; integration must pass through Engagement Gateway Lite.
global_rules.test_rule: Use risk-based exhaustive tests, not fake 100 percent coverage.
global_rules.exact_file_plan_rule: Before editing, each ticket must produce an exact-file implementation plan from any broad allowed glob. If required files fall outside that exact plan, Codex must stop.
global_rules.active_control_docs_rule: Active Phase 2 control documents under docs/process and PLANS.md must not be mutated during the autonomous run except by an explicit control-document correction ticket.
global_rules.module_manifest_repo_pattern: This repo currently uses TypeScript manifest/contract files under packages/contracts, such as *module-manifest*.contract.ts, unless a future approved ticket introduces a separate manifest directory.
global_rules.phase2_registry_rule: Do not use pnpm registry:verify:phase1 as the final validator for Phase 2 schema additions. P2-VAL-001 must add a Phase 2-aware verification path before schema tickets edit Prisma models.
global_rules.phase2_screen_contract_rule: P2-VAL-002 must add Phase 2 screen-contract validation support before Lead Desk screen contracts are added.
global_rules.migration_policy: If the repo still has no Prisma migrations directory, schema/data tickets must explicitly decide schema/registry-only versus migration scaffolding. If migration scaffolding is required, Codex must stop unless that work is explicitly ticketed. Destructive migrations are forbidden.
global_rules.phase2c_governance_rule: Phase 2A and Phase 2B are not blocked by ADR-0003 pilot-date status. Phase 2C cannot execute until ADR-0003 Phase 2C pilot target date is assigned or a formal exception is recorded.
global_rules.execution_environment_rule: Autonomous execution must run only in an approved safe Codex environment: not danger-full-access, not unrestricted network, not approval-never, and no production secrets. workspace-write/on-request/no-network is preferred unless explicitly approved otherwise.
global_rules.v3_autonomy_rule: Codex may continue through AUTONOMOUS_READY, AUTONOMOUS_AFTER_PREVIOUS, and AUTONOMOUS_DECISION_RULE tickets when the encoded decision rule passes and no hard gate triggers.

autonomous_status_policy.AUTONOMOUS_READY: May run next after normal prechecks.
autonomous_status_policy.AUTONOMOUS_AFTER_PREVIOUS: May run after prior ticket passes validation and artifacts.
autonomous_status_policy.AUTONOMOUS_DECISION_RULE: May continue only by applying the explicit autonomous_decision_rule for the ticket.
autonomous_status_policy.GOVERNANCE_BLOCKED: Must not run until governance condition is resolved.

v3_decision_rules.P2A-002: If P2A-001 contracts do not require persisted gateway request state, formally defer persistence with artifact/journal and continue. If persistence is required and exact models are derivable without new business rules, implement after P2-VAL-001. If unclear, stop.
v3_decision_rules.P2B-001A: Codex may define minimal Lead Desk contract boundary only for lead intake, list, detail, status, and assignment. Exclude campaigns, finance, student lifecycle, LMS, HR, certification, direct WhatsApp, Meta, and provider concepts. If a business rule is unclear, use a neutral contract only if it does not create behavior; otherwise stop.
v3_decision_rules.P2B-001B: Codex may create screen contracts only for lead inbox/list, lead detail, lead create, and lead assignment/status action screens. No frontend implementation.
v3_decision_rules.P2B-002A: Codex may derive data model only from approved Lead Desk contracts and screen contracts. Proceed only if exact minimal model set, tenant ownership, indexes, registry metadata, and migration policy are clear. If unclear, stop.
v3_decision_rules.P2B-002B: Implement Lead Desk schema/registry only after P2B-002A confirms exact model set and P2-VAL-001 is complete. If migration scaffolding is required but not explicitly ticketed, stop. No destructive migrations.
v3_decision_rules.P2B_API: Codex may implement only APIs backed by approved contracts and models. No direct WhatsApp/Meta. No unapproved status workflows. No fake data. No hardcoded tenant, campus, role, user, or organization assumptions.
v3_decision_rules.P2B_FRONTEND: Codex may implement only screens with approved screen contracts. No fake dashboards. No hardcoded campus, role, user, tenant, or organization assumptions. Must include empty/loading/error/permission-denied states as required by screen contracts.
v3_decision_rules.P2C: P2C remains blocked until ADR-0003 has a Phase 2C pilot target date or a formal exception.

phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2a: Run full standard validation ladder and create phase gate artifact.
phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2b: Run full standard validation ladder and create phase gate artifact.
phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2c: Run full standard validation ladder and create final branch audit package.

artifact_policy.p2a_001_backfill_note: P2A-001 artifacts were backfilled after commit 944d0c84badbf9633c12c395f8e50cb08cc96571 because the implementation commit lacked artifacts.
artifact_policy.future_ticket_rule: Future tickets must create ticket artifacts and update the journal before committing ticket source changes.
artifact_policy.ignored_artifacts_rule: If codex-review is ignored, artifacts must still be included in the final audit package and reported in the journal.

stop_conditions: Required file outside exact ticket scope
Secret access, inspection, printing, copying, exporting, or use required
Active control docs need mutation outside an explicit control-doc correction ticket
Invented business rule, capability, permission, event, module, role, or screen required
Migration scaffolding required but not explicitly ticketed
Fake dashboards or fake operational data
Ticket artifacts cannot be created or verified
Dirty branch at ticket start except ignored review artifacts

ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Add Phase 2-aware registry verification while preserving Phase 1 protections.
ordered_ticket_queue.autonomous_decision_rule: Proceed autonomously if the exact-file plan changes only registry tooling/package-script files and Phase 1 verifier behavior remains intact. Stop if CI/workflow changes are broader than the exact plan.
scope: Add registry:verify:phase2 path.
Preserve registry:verify:phase1 behavior.
files_expected_to_change: package.json if script wiring is required

ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert files changed by this ticket.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Engagement Gateway persistence decision
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Decide whether Engagement Gateway persistence is required now or formally deferred.
ordered_ticket_queue.autonomous_decision_rule: If P2A-001 contracts do not require persisted gateway request state, formally defer persistence with artifact/journal and continue. If persistence is required and exact models are derivable without new business rules, implement after P2-VAL-001. If unclear, stop.
scope: Apply persistence decision rule.
Defer if contracts do not require persistence.
Implement only exact derivable models after P2-VAL-001.
files_expected_to_change: Implementation path: prisma/schema.prisma, prisma/entity-registry.metadata.json, generated/entity-registry.generated.json after exact-file plan
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: Record whether persistence is needed for audit/outbox semantics; no runtime implementation here.
validation_commands: Deferral path: git status and artifact verification
Implementation path: Prisma validate/generate, registry generate/check/verify:phase2, lint, typecheck, test, build, diff check

ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert files changed by this ticket.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Implement Engagement Gateway Lite API/service foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Implement minimal Engagement Gateway API/service boundary according to approved contracts and P2A-002 decision.
ordered_ticket_queue.autonomous_decision_rule: Proceed if API can validate contracts, enforce actor/capability/Gatekeeper, and avoid provider delivery. Stop if persistence or delivery semantics are unclear.
scope: Service/controller boundary.
Contract validation.
Actor/capability/Gatekeeper enforcement for high-risk create request.
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Create request requires actor and engagement.gateway.request.create capability.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: Create request uses Gatekeeper because capability is high risk.
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: Follow approved Phase 1 audit/outbox policies; no provider delivery.
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2A-003 implement engagement gateway API foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert files changed by this ticket.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Phase 2A validation gate
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Validate Phase 2A before Lead Desk work begins.
ordered_ticket_queue.autonomous_decision_rule: Proceed autonomously if all Phase 2A validation passes and artifacts exist. Stop if validation fails twice or artifact evidence is missing.
scope: Audit and validation only.
validation_commands: full available validation ladder including pnpm registry:verify:phase2

ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: No source changes expected.

ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Add Phase 2 screen-contract validation before Lead Desk screen contracts.
ordered_ticket_queue.autonomous_decision_rule: Proceed if Phase 1 screen validation remains intact and Phase 2 directory policy is clear. Stop if validator schema needs architecture change.
